title: Golden test overlap-domain claim label acceptance (mock)
problem: Ticket-121 wired claim_validator to pack domain.yaml allowlists, but golden mock extraction still only proves domain=creativity claims. A golden test should prove overlap labels (e.g. art) survive the extract-and-validate path end-to-end in mock mode.
acceptance_criteria: Mock fixture produces at least one accepted claim with domain overlap label (e.g. art).
Golden test runs extract-and-validate in mock mode without Ollama.
Existing golden claim extraction tests remain green.
Full pytest and safety audit pass.
non_goals: No live Ollama or new CLI flags.
No public site routing or committed JSON changes.
rollback_plan: Remove overlap-domain golden fixture and test file.
